ddls:
CREATE TABLE "demographics" (
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each demographic record */,
  "age" INTEGER /* Age of the individual */,
  "workclass" TEXT /* Workclass of the individual (e.g., Private, Local-gov) */,
  "education" TEXT /* Education level of the individual (e.g., 11th, HS-grad) */,
  "marital_status" TEXT /* Marital status of the individual (e.g., Never-married, Married-civ-spouse) */,
  "occupation" TEXT /* Occupation of the individual (e.g., Machine-op-inspct, Farming-fishing) */,
  "relationship" TEXT /* Relationship status of the individual (e.g., Own-child, Husband) */,
  "race" TEXT /* Race of the individual (e.g., Black, White) */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the individual (e.g., Male, Female) */,
  "ethnicity" TEXT /* Ethnicity of the individual */,
  "disability_status" TEXT /* Disability status of the individual */,
  "veteran_status" TEXT /* Veteran status of the individual */,
  "language" TEXT /* Primary language spoken by the individual */,
  "geographic_location" TEXT /* Geographic location of the individual (e.g., city, state, zip code) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the individual */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the individual */,
  "citizenship_status" TEXT /* Citizenship status of the individual */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "income" (
  "income_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each income record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with the income record */,
  "capital_gain" INTEGER /* Capital gain of the individual */,
  "capital_loss" INTEGER /* Capital loss of the individual */,
  "native_country" TEXT /* Native country of the individual */,
  "income_level" TEXT /* Income level of the individual (e.g., <=50K, >50K) */,
  "hourly_wage" TEXT /* Hourly wage of the individual */,
  "annual_salary" TEXT /* Annual salary of the individual */,
  "employment_status" TEXT /* Employment status of the individual (e.g., employed, unemployed, retired) */,
  "tax_filing_status" TEXT /* Tax filing status of the individual (e.g., single, married filing jointly) */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year of the income data for time-series analysis */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("income_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_income_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "work_hours" (
  "work_hour_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each work hours record */,
  "demographic_id" INTEGER /* ID of the demographic record associated with the work hours record */,
  "work_hours_category" TEXT /* Work hours category of the individual (e.g., Moderate Overtime, Overtime) */,
  "hours_per_week" INTEGER /* Exact number of hours worked per week */,
  "overtime_hours" INTEGER /* Number of overtime hours worked per week */,
  "work_schedule" TEXT /* Work schedule of the individual (e.g., full-time, part-time, flex-time) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("work_hour_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_work_hours_demographic_id FOREIGN KEY ("demographic_id") REFERENCES demographics ("demographic_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "education_levels" (
  "education_level_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each education level */,
  "education_level_name" TEXT /* Name of the education level (e.g., 11th, HS-grad) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the education level */,
  "degree_type" TEXT /* Type of degree (e.g., Bachelor's, Master's, Doctorate) */,
  "field_of_study" TEXT /* Field of study */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Educational institution */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("education_level_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "occupations" (
  "occupation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each occupation */,
  "occupation_name" TEXT /* Name of the occupation (e.g., Machine-op-inspct, Farming-fishing) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the occupation */,
  "industry" TEXT /* Industry of the occupation */,
  "job_title" TEXT /* Specific job title */,
  "job_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the job */,
  "required_education" TEXT /* Required education level for the job */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("occupation_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., HR analyst, researcher, admin) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the user belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role within the department */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Date the user joined the organization */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Specific permissions granted to the user */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive, suspended) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
